generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. Critics who push for isolationism ignore the cold reality: our partners share the burden, giving us early warnings and operational support we can't afford to lose. The data is clear - nations with strong alliances face 40% fewer security threats. We can't afford to gamble with our safety. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
